description: Composition Black polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed and tipped collar with orange fabric tape inseam, buttoned chest placket, printed Leaping cap logo on left chest and brand badge on right hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm up and enjoy healthy sporting in style with this puma polo neck t-shirt. Made of pure cotton fabric, you are sure to stay fresh and comfortable in it all day long, while the Jumping cat logo enhances your fashion statement. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
